description: Mountain lodge offering cedar cabins with fireplaces near the park, plus free parking & Wi-Fi.

name: Canyon River Ranch
description: Warm condos in a cozy hotel on the Yakima River, with an outdoor pool, river rafting & a restaurant.

name: Eco Park Resort
description: Secluded resort offering log cabins & yurts with shared bathrooms, plus casual dining & a fire pit.

name: Kelly's Resort
description: Waterfront complex featuring cottages with kitchens & decks, plus a convenience store & pool.

name: Bigsby's Folly Craft Winery & Restaurant
description: House wines star at this full bar with an industrial-artsy vibe & a menu of small plates.

name: The Wells House
description: Landmark circa-1909 home once home to Wenatchee Valley College, now rentable for private events.

name: Temple Hoyne Buell Theatre
description: Sleek space in the Denver Center for Performing Arts for dance productions, plays & more.

name: Balistreri Vineyards
description: Cozy, family-run winery, tasting room & event center offering daily tours & a seasonal lunch menu.
